mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-DlvryWblManager-sql-oracle.xml.selectDlvryWblInfo 택배사 운송장번호 대역 정보 조회 */ SELECT WBL.CTKEY ,WBL.OWKEY ,WBL.DLVRYCORPCD AS DLVRY_CORP_CD ,WBL.ISSUSEQ AS ISSU_SEQ ,WBL.WBLFROMNO AS WBL_FROM_NO ,WBL.WBLTONO AS WBL_TO_NO ,WBL.WBLCURRNO AS WBL_CURR_NO FROM (SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,DLVRYCORPCD ,ISSUSEQ ,WBLFROMNO ,WBLTONO ,COALESCE(WBLCURRNO, WBLFROMNO) AS WBLCURRNO ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ISSUSEQ) AS RN FROM TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP_WBL WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND DLVRYCORPCD = #{dlvryCorpCd} AND DELYN = 'N' ) WBL WHERE RN = 1 AND CAST(WBLCURRNO AS NUMERIC) + #{okCnt} <= CAST(WBLTONO AS NUMERIC)

/* wms-outbound-DlvryWblManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectDlvrycorpWblTsdnotirt - 입고반품 - 운송장번호 임계치 알림율 조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN DC.TSDNOTIRT <= ROUND((CAST(DW.WBLCURRNO AS NUMERIC) - CAST(DW.WBLFROMNO AS NUMERIC)) / NULLIF((CAST(DW.WBLTONO AS NUMERIC) - CAST(DW.WBLFROMNO AS NUMERIC)), 0) * 100,0) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TSDNOTIYN /* 임계치알림여부 */ , DW.CTKEY /* 센터코드 */ , DW.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , DW.DLVRYCORPCD /* 택배사코드 */ , DC.TSDNOTIRT /* 임계치알림율 */ , DW.WBLCURRNO /* 현재사용중인 운송장번호 */ , ROUND((CAST(DW.WBLCURRNO AS NUMERIC) - CAST(DW.WBLFROMNO AS NUMERIC)) / NULLIF((CAST(DW.WBLTONO AS NUMERIC) - CAST(DW.WBLFROMNO AS NUMERIC)), 0) * 100,0) AS USERT /* 사용율 */ , DW.TSDSENDYN /* 임계치전송여부 */ FROM TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP_WBL DW INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP DC ON DW.CTKEY = DC.CTKEY AND DW.OWKEY = DC.OWKEY AND DW.DLVRYCORPCD = DC.DLVRYCORPCD WHERE DW.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND DW.DELYN = 'N' AND DC.DELYN = 'N' AND DW.DLVRYCORPCD = #{dlvryCorpCd}
